Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Continued To Feb-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jan-02-2018 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Liza Bunker for (executor) Constance Hiatt.

Ms. Bunker reported that they are unable to do a preliminary distribution, that there is an issue regarding income tax liability, that if they were to hold a reserve it would be the entirety of the estate based on exposure, that there are potential outstanding liabilities, that there is nothing to distribute presently and that they have paid off a mortgage and she is not clear of the current value of assets. The Court stated that there have been no objections and that everyone has been served and granted the probate status report (subject to review of the order), requesting that counsel continue looking to see if distribution is available.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
